steps.title: Create the Slack app
steps.body: api.slack.com/apps → Create New App → From a manifest → paste this:
steps.content:
display_information:
  name: KIAgent
  description: Personal digital memory indexing (runs locally on your Mac)
oauth_config:
  scopes:
    user:
      - channels:history
      - channels:read
      - groups:history
      - groups:read
      - im:history
      - im:read
      - mpim:history
      - mpim:read
      - users:read
      - files:read
settings:
  org_deploy_enabled: false
  socket_mode_enabled: false
  token_rotation_enabled: false

steps.title: Install to your workspace
steps.body: On the app page: Install App → Install to Workspace.
